sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56719" key="keramw/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κερᾰμ-ών</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n56719.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">store for pottery</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tiles</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.32</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
